bids.reasoning: At this early stage of the negotiation (t=0.0), I aim for an offer close to my maximum utility. Therefore, I will respond with an offer that aligns with my highest utility values across the most important issues. Since all my issues are included with the correct values in your offer, I will form the offer accordingly.
